name: HSK 3 Vocabulary (汉语水平考试)
description: Mandarin Chinese vocabulary for HSK 3. Source: drkameleon/complete-hsk-vocabulary (MIT), derived from CC-CEDICT (CC-BY-SA 4.0).

to like; to be fond of; to take pleasure in; to be keen on; interest; hobby
